name: explain-my-error
description: Turns cryptic terminal errors into plain-English explanations with concrete fix steps.
author: Pawan Kumar Ray

commands.title: Explain My Error: Explain Last Terminal Error
Explain My Error: Explain Selected Text
Explain My Error: Toggle Auto-Detect On Failure
Explain My Error: Configure AI Provider
Explain My Error: Clear Cached AI Responses

explainMyError.autoDetect.description: Automatically show a prompt when a terminal command exits with an error.

explainMyError.useAiFallback.description: When no local rule matches, send the error to an AI model (your choice of Google Gemini, Anthropic Claude, or OpenAI) for an explanation. Requires an API key for whichever provider you pick. Nothing is sent unless this is enabled.

explainMyError.maxOutputLines.description: Maximum number of terminal output lines to scan when looking for an error.

explainMyError.huggingfaceModel.description: Which model to use when the AI provider is Hugging Face. Must be a model supported by an inference provider enabled on your Hugging Face account (see https://huggingface.co/settings/inference-providers).
